method.name: deterministic_llm_proposal_validation
method.decision_policy: Validate LLM proposal claims using source traces, domain refs, local boundary status, data-view coordinates, table I/O pipeline evidence, formula/pivot topology, confidence thresholds, and alias conflicts. This stage does not recalculate Excel formula results and does not assemble the final document graph.

semantic_readiness.shared_ontology_promotion_condition: Requires explicit local boundary, repeated workbook-pair evidence, conflict checks, and human review.
